author: eric
description: Sync your vault to a Gitee or GitHub repository. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: eric
manifest.description: Sync your vault to a Gitee or GitHub repository.
manifest.name: Gitee Sync

name: Gitee Sync

releases.author: ericquan8
releases.description:
Add automatic Chinese and English localization based on the current Obsidian app language.

- Localize settings, descriptions, and Gitee/GitHub dropdown options.
- Localize commands, status bar text, notices, errors, sync previews, and diagnostic logs.
- Use Chinese for all Chinese locales and English for every other language.
- Keep existing sync behavior and configuration unchanged.

releases.author: ericquan8
releases.description: Adds a dry-run 'preview sync plan' command and an optional debug log written to _gitee-sync-log.md inside the vault — every planned action is listed with its reason, for diagnosing sync behavior on mobile where devtools are unavailable. Errors now name the affected file; partial progress is persisted.

releases.author: ericquan8
releases.description:
Fix iOS cross-device synchronization when plugin data is shared through iCloud.

- Store the three-way sync baseline in device-local Obsidian storage.
- Prevent files not yet present on iOS from being mistaken for local deletions.
- Rebuild the device baseline safely on the first sync after upgrading.
- Require Obsidian 1.8.7 or later.

releases.author: ericquan8
releases.description: Two-phase sync: all remote changes are pulled before local changes are pushed, so an interrupted sync never leaves the remote half-updated. Status bar item is now clickable to trigger a manual sync.

releases.author: ericquan8
releases.description: Initial public release: three-way incremental sync to a Gitee or GitHub repository. Desktop and mobile.
